  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7 SP1/8/10
  • Processor: Intel i3 2100+ or AMD FX-4100+
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: 1024 MB VRAM, nVidia GTX 750+ or AMD Radeon HD 7770M+ or Intel HD Graphics 5300+
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX compatible
  • Additional Notes: Requirements may change on release.
